@font-face { font-family: 'octicons'; src: url('/assets/fonts/octicons/2.1.2/fonts/octicons.eot?#iefix') format('embedded-opentype'), url('/assets/fonts/octicons/2.1.2/fonts/octicons.woff') format('woff'), url('/assets/fonts/octicons/2.1.2/fonts/octicons.ttf') format('truetype'), url('/assets/fonts/octicons/2.1.2/fonts/octicons.svg#octicons') format('svg'); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } /* .octicon is optimized for 16px. .mega-octicon is optimized for 32px but can be used larger. */ .octicon, .mega-octicon { font: normal normal normal 16px/1 octicons; display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; text-rendering: auto; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; -webkit-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none; -ms-user-select: none; user-select: none; } .mega-octicon { font-size: 32px; } .octicon-alert:before { content: '\f02d'} /* ’ĆŁ */ .octicon-alignment-align:before { content: '\f08a'} /* ’éŖ */ .octicon-alignment-aligned-to:before { content: '\f08e'} /* ’éÄ */ .octicon-alignment-unalign:before { content: '\f08b'} /* ’éŗ */ .octicon-arrow-down:before { content: '\f03f'} /* ’Ć┐ */ .octicon-arrow-left:before { content: '\f040'} /* ’üĆ */ .octicon-arrow-right:before { content: '\f03e'} /* ’ĆŠ */ .octicon-arrow-small-down:before { content: '\f0a0'} /* ’éĀ */ .octicon-arrow-small-left:before { content: '\f0a1'} /* ’éĪ */ .octicon-arrow-small-right:before { content: '\f071'} /* ’ü▒ */ .octicon-arrow-small-up:before { content: '\f09f'} /* ’é¤ */ .octicon-arrow-up:before { content: '\f03d'} /* ’ĆĮ */ .octicon-beer:before { content: '\f069'} /* ’ü® */ .octicon-book:before { content: '\f007'} /* ’Ćć */ .octicon-bookmark:before { content: '\f07b'} /* ’ü╗ */ .octicon-briefcase:before { content: '\f0d3'} /* ’āō */ .octicon-broadcast:before { content: '\f048'} /* ’üł */ .octicon-browser:before { content: '\f0c5'} /* ’āģ */ .octicon-bug:before { content: '\f091'} /* ’éæ */ .octicon-calendar:before { content: '\f068'} /* ’ü© */ .octicon-check:before { content: '\f03a'} /* ’Ć║ */ .octicon-checklist:before { content: '\f076'} /* ’üČ */ .octicon-chevron-down:before { content: '\f0a3'} /* ’éŻ */ .octicon-chevron-left:before { content: '\f0a4'} /* ’éż */ .octicon-chevron-right:before { content: '\f078'} /* ’üĖ */ .octicon-chevron-up:before { content: '\f0a2'} /* ’éó */ .octicon-circle-slash:before { content: '\f084'} /* ’éä */ .octicon-circuit-board:before { content: '\f0d6'} /* ’ā¢ */ .octicon-clippy:before { content: '\f035'} /* ’ĆĄ */ .octicon-clock:before { content: '\f046'} /* ’üå */ .octicon-cloud-download:before { content: '\f00b'} /* ’Ćŗ */ .octicon-cloud-upload:before { content: '\f00c'} /* ’Ćī */ .octicon-code:before { content: '\f05f'} /* ’ü¤ */ .octicon-color-mode:before { content: '\f065'} /* ’üź */ .octicon-comment-add:before, .octicon-comment:before { content: '\f02b'} /* ’Ć½ */ .octicon-comment-discussion:before { content: '\f04f'} /* ’üÅ */ .octicon-credit-card:before { content: '\f045'} /* ’üģ */ .octicon-dash:before { content: '\f0ca'} /* ’āŖ */ .octicon-dashboard:before { content: '\f07d'} /* ’üĮ */ .octicon-database:before { content: '\f096'} /* ’é¢ */ .octicon-device-camera:before { content: '\f056'} /* ’ü¢ */ .octicon-device-camera-video:before { content: '\f057'} /* ’üŚ */ .octicon-device-desktop:before { content: '\f27c'} /* ’ē╝ */ .octicon-device-mobile:before { content: '\f038'} /* ’ĆĖ */ .octicon-diff:before { content: '\f04d'} /* ’üŹ */ .octicon-diff-added:before { content: '\f06b'} /* ’ü½ */ .octicon-diff-ignored:before { content: '\f099'} /* ’éÖ */ .octicon-diff-modified:before { content: '\f06d'} /* ’üŁ */ .octicon-diff-removed:before { content: '\f06c'} /* ’ü¼ */ .octicon-diff-renamed:before { content: '\f06e'} /* ’ü« */ .octicon-ellipsis:before { content: '\f09a'} /* ’éÜ */ .octicon-eye-unwatch:before, .octicon-eye-watch:before, .octicon-eye:before { content: '\f04e'} /* ’üÄ */ .octicon-file-binary:before { content: '\f094'} /* ’éö */ .octicon-file-code:before { content: '\f010'} /* ’ĆÉ */ .octicon-file-directory:before { content: '\f016'} /* ’Ć¢ */ .octicon-file-media:before { content: '\f012'} /* ’ĆÆ */ .octicon-file-pdf:before { content: '\f014'} /* ’Ćö */ .octicon-file-submodule:before { content: '\f017'} /* ’ĆŚ */ .octicon-file-symlink-directory:before { content: '\f0b1'} /* ’é▒ */ .octicon-file-symlink-file:before { content: '\f0b0'} /* ’é░ */ .octicon-file-text:before { content: '\f011'} /* ’Ćæ */ .octicon-file-zip:before { content: '\f013'} /* ’Ćō */ .octicon-flame:before { content: '\f0d2'} /* ’āÆ */ .octicon-fold:before { content: '\f0cc'} /* ’āī */ .octicon-gear:before { content: '\f02f'} /* ’Ć» */ .octicon-gift:before { content: '\f042'} /* ’üé */ .octicon-gist:before { content: '\f00e'} /* ’ĆÄ */ .octicon-gist-secret:before { content: '\f08c'} /* ’éī */ .octicon-git-branch-create:before, .octicon-git-branch-delete:before, .octicon-git-branch:before { content: '\f020'} /* ’ĆĀ */ .octicon-git-commit:before { content: '\f01f'} /* ’Ć¤ */ .octicon-git-compare:before { content: '\f0ac'} /* ’é¼ */ .octicon-git-merge:before { content: '\f023'} /* ’ĆŻ */ .octicon-git-pull-request-abandoned:before, .octicon-git-pull-request:before { content: '\f009'} /* ’Ćē */ .octicon-globe:before { content: '\f0b6'} /* ’éČ */ .octicon-graph:before { content: '\f043'} /* ’üā */ .octicon-heart:before { content: '\2665'} /* ŌÖź */ .octicon-history:before { content: '\f07e'} /* ’üŠ */ .octicon-home:before { content: '\f08d'} /* ’éŹ */ .octicon-horizontal-rule:before { content: '\f070'} /* ’ü░ */ .octicon-hourglass:before { content: '\f09e'} /* ’é× */ .octicon-hubot:before { content: '\f09d'} /* ’éØ */ .octicon-inbox:before { content: '\f0cf'} /* ’āÅ */ .octicon-info:before { content: '\f059'} /* ’üÖ */ .octicon-issue-closed:before { content: '\f028'} /* ’Ć© */ .octicon-issue-opened:before { content: '\f026'} /* ’Ć” */ .octicon-issue-reopened:before { content: '\f027'} /* ’Ć¦ */ .octicon-jersey:before { content: '\f019'} /* ’ĆÖ */ .octicon-jump-down:before { content: '\f072'} /* ’ü▓ */ .octicon-jump-left:before { content: '\f0a5'} /* ’éź */ .octicon-jump-right:before { content: '\f0a6'} /* ’é” */ .octicon-jump-up:before { content: '\f073'} /* ’ü│ */ .octicon-key:before { content: '\f049'} /* ’üē */ .octicon-keyboard:before { content: '\f00d'} /* ’ĆŹ */ .octicon-law:before { content: '\f0d8'} /* */ .octicon-light-bulb:before { content: '\f000'} /* ’ĆĆ */ .octicon-link:before { content: '\f05c'} /* ’ü£ */ .octicon-link-external:before { content: '\f07f'} /* ’ü┐ */ .octicon-list-ordered:before { content: '\f062'} /* ’üó */ .octicon-list-unordered:before { content: '\f061'} /* ’üĪ */ .octicon-location:before { content: '\f060'} /* ’üĀ */ .octicon-gist-private:before, .octicon-mirror-private:before, .octicon-git-fork-private:before, .octicon-lock:before { content: '\f06a'} /* ’ü¬ */ .octicon-logo-github:before { content: '\f092'} /* ’éÆ */ .octicon-mail:before { content: '\f03b'} /* ’Ć╗ */ .octicon-mail-read:before { content: '\f03c'} /* ’Ć╝ */ .octicon-mail-reply:before { content: '\f051'} /* ’üæ */ .octicon-mark-github:before { content: '\f00a'} /* ’ĆŖ */ .octicon-markdown:before { content: '\f0c9'} /* ’āē */ .octicon-megaphone:before { content: '\f077'} /* ’üĘ */ .octicon-mention:before { content: '\f0be'} /* ’éŠ */ .octicon-microscope:before { content: '\f089'} /* ’éē */ .octicon-milestone:before { content: '\f075'} /* ’üĄ */ .octicon-mirror-public:before, .octicon-mirror:before { content: '\f024'} /* ’Ćż */ .octicon-mortar-board:before { content: '\f0d7'} /* */ .octicon-move-down:before { content: '\f0a8'} /* ’é© */ .octicon-move-left:before { content: '\f074'} /* ’ü┤ */ .octicon-move-right:before { content: '\f0a9'} /* ’é® */ .octicon-move-up:before { content: '\f0a7'} /* ’é¦ */ .octicon-mute:before { content: '\f080'} /* ’éĆ */ .octicon-no-newline:before { content: '\f09c'} /* ’é£ */ .octicon-octoface:before { content: '\f008'} /* ’Ćł */ .octicon-organization:before { content: '\f037'} /* ’ĆĘ */ .octicon-package:before { content: '\f0c4'} /* ’āä */ .octicon-paintcan:before { content: '\f0d1'} /* ’āæ */ .octicon-pencil:before { content: '\f058'} /* ’üś */ .octicon-person-add:before, .octicon-person-follow:before, .octicon-person:before { content: '\f018'} /* ’Ćś */ .octicon-pin:before { content: '\f041'} /* ’üü */ .octicon-playback-fast-forward:before { content: '\f0bd'} /* ’éĮ */ .octicon-playback-pause:before { content: '\f0bb'} /* ’é╗ */ .octicon-playback-play:before { content: '\f0bf'} /* ’é┐ */ .octicon-playback-rewind:before { content: '\f0bc'} /* ’é╝ */ .octicon-plug:before { content: '\f0d4'} /* ’āö */ .octicon-repo-create:before, .octicon-gist-new:before, .octicon-file-directory-create:before, .octicon-file-add:before, .octicon-plus:before { content: '\f05d'} /* ’üØ */ .octicon-podium:before { content: '\f0af'} /* ’é» */ .octicon-primitive-dot:before { content: '\f052'} /* ’üÆ */ .octicon-primitive-square:before { content: '\f053'} /* ’üō */ .octicon-pulse:before { content: '\f085'} /* ’éģ */ .octicon-puzzle:before { content: '\f0c0'} /* ’āĆ */ .octicon-question:before { content: '\f02c'} /* ’Ć¼ */ .octicon-quote:before { content: '\f063'} /* ’üŻ */ .octicon-radio-tower:before { content: '\f030'} /* ’Ć░ */ .octicon-repo-delete:before, .octicon-repo:before { content: '\f001'} /* ’Ćü */ .octicon-repo-clone:before { content: '\f04c'} /* ’üī */ .octicon-repo-force-push:before { content: '\f04a'} /* ’üŖ */ .octicon-gist-fork:before, .octicon-repo-forked:before { content: '\f002'} /* ’Ćé */ .octicon-repo-pull:before { content: '\f006'} /* ’Ćå */ .octicon-repo-push:before { content: '\f005'} /* ’Ćģ */ .octicon-rocket:before { content: '\f033'} /* ’Ć│ */ .octicon-rss:before { content: '\f034'} /* ’Ć┤ */ .octicon-ruby:before { content: '\f047'} /* ’üć */ .octicon-screen-full:before { content: '\f066'} /* ’ü” */ .octicon-screen-normal:before { content: '\f067'} /* ’ü¦ */ .octicon-search-save:before, .octicon-search:before { content: '\f02e'} /* ’Ć« */ .octicon-server:before { content: '\f097'} /* ’éŚ */ .octicon-settings:before { content: '\f07c'} /* ’ü╝ */ .octicon-log-in:before, .octicon-sign-in:before { content: '\f036'} /* ’ĆČ */ .octicon-log-out:before, .octicon-sign-out:before { content: '\f032'} /* ’Ć▓ */ .octicon-split:before { content: '\f0c6'} /* ’āå */ .octicon-squirrel:before { content: '\f0b2'} /* ’é▓ */ .octicon-star-add:before, .octicon-star-delete:before, .octicon-star:before { content: '\f02a'} /* ’Ć¬ */ .octicon-steps:before { content: '\f0c7'} /* ’āć */ .octicon-stop:before { content: '\f08f'} /* ’éÅ */ .octicon-repo-sync:before, .octicon-sync:before { content: '\f087'} /* ’éć */ .octicon-tag-remove:before, .octicon-tag-add:before, .octicon-tag:before { content: '\f015'} /* ’ĆĢ */ .octicon-telescope:before { content: '\f088'} /* ’éł */ .octicon-terminal:before { content: '\f0c8'} /* ’āł */ .octicon-three-bars:before { content: '\f05e'} /* ’ü× */ .octicon-tools:before { content: '\f031'} /* ’Ć▒ */ .octicon-trashcan:before { content: '\f0d0'} /* ’āÉ */ .octicon-triangle-down:before { content: '\f05b'} /* ’üø */ .octicon-triangle-left:before { content: '\f044'} /* ’üä */ .octicon-triangle-right:before { content: '\f05a'} /* ’üÜ */ .octicon-triangle-up:before { content: '\f0aa'} /* ’é¬ */ .octicon-unfold:before { content: '\f039'} /* ’Ć╣ */ .octicon-unmute:before { content: '\f0ba'} /* ’é║ */ .octicon-versions:before { content: '\f064'} /* ’üż */ .octicon-remove-close:before, .octicon-x:before { content: '\f081'} /* ’éü */ .octicon-zap:before { content: '\26A1'} /* ŌÜĪ */
